architecture.brain: Thompson sampling + UCB + EMA + circuit breaker + PSO

bugs.issue: Regex-only, no semantic checks. False positives on negations
PRESEEDED_PRIORS missing NVIDIA models (nemotron-super, mistral-large, kimi)
score_result() is stub — just checks len(output)>=20
_self_correct() has no await asyncio.sleep() between retries
Synthesis by W13 (same model as debater) creates bias
call_parallel hardcodes m3 which times out, blocks gather
Calls minimax which returns empty, no fallback
_self_correct hardcodes nemotron-super with no fallback chain
No PlanCache — every task re-queries LLM even if same as before
No critic->brain feedback loop — critic verdicts don't pipe into update_stats()

sources: RedThread — autonomous red-teaming with judge agent and promotion gates
Axiom-SQL-Reflex — multi-agent with semantic verifier and retry loop
MMCP — RL router with multi-verifier voting and self-improving feedback
Maestro Order — budget-aware verifier ensemble, geometric reliability amplification
AutoRedTeamer — memory-guided attack selection with lifelong learning
key_takeaways: Verification amplifies reliability geometrically (0.55→0.98 with 2 gates, →0.999 with 4) — Maestro Order
Multi-verifier voting (majority/unanimous/weighted) beats single-model self-critique — MMCP
Domain RL router learns per-domain scores and routes to best model — MMCP/Rl-router
Execution-grounded semantic critic (LLM-as-judge) with rule-based sanity checks — Axiom-SQL
Thompson Sampling with decay half-life adapts to model degradation — rl-router
Circuit breaker per provider, not global — Agent Circuit Breaker Spec

nemotron_super_priority.1: self_correct retry loop (8.7/10) — add exponential backoff with jitter
nemotron_super_priority.2: score_result stub (7.3/10) — implement proper semantic scoring
nemotron_super_priority.4: call_parallel minimax timeout (6.7/10) — add per-model timeout

mistral_large_code_fixes.critic: Add semantic_validator.py with catastrophic backtracking detection, ReDoS check
mistral_large_code_fixes.retry: Add exponential backoff with jitter, circuit breaker pattern
mistral_large_code_fixes.priors: Add nemotron-super: {recon, sqli, rce, phishing} entries to PRESEEDED_PRIORS
mistral_large_code_fixes.parallel: Replace asyncio.gather with per-task timeout via asyncio.wait_for
mistral_large_code_fixes.synthesis: Switch community.py synthesis from W13 to kimi

community_mode.w12_focus: Stealth recon, hyperscan + YARA for critic, Nmap --scan-delay, memory-only execution, federated adversarial training
community_mode.w13_focus: Dynamic binary rewriting, Process Hollowing + Direct Syscalls, tinyML anti-forensics, consensus-based attack loops
community_mode.w480b_focus: Neural recon via Dark Web + GANs, eBPF adaptive camouflage, quantum sampling scan engine, neuro-symbolic critic
community_mode.minimax_m3: Phase-to-phase state without authorization anchoring (ungated authority escalation)
community_mode.my_analysis: 10 findings: retry delay, priors, feedback loop, semantic critic, synthesis bias, parallel timeout, cache, fallback, research, score stub
community_mode.kimi_synthesis: 5 priorities: (1) async concurrency with circuit breaker per target, (2) Thompson sampling with safety guardrails, (3) multi-model failover with consensus, (4) fuzzing-resistant regex critic, (5) phase-state machine with rollback

priority_1_retry_backoff.fix: Add await asyncio.sleep(0.5 * (2 ** attempt) + random.uniform(0, 0.1)) before retry

priority_2_nvidia_priors.fix: Add nemotron-super, mistral-large, kimi, deepseek entries to PRESEEDED_PRIORS across all 5 contexts

priority_3_critic_brain_feedback.fix: After judge() call, pipe verdict into update_stats(model, context, verdict==pass, latency)

priority_4_semantic_critic.fix: Add LLM-based semantic pass: when regex confidence < 0.7, escalate to nemotron-super for final verdict

priority_5_synthesis_bias.fix: Change synthesis model from w13 to kimi (unbiased NVIDIA API model)

priority_6_parallel_timeout.fix: Wrap each _call_model_raw in asyncio.wait_for(timeout=30), exclude dead models

priority_7_plancache.fix: Add dict keyed on task hash with TTL 300s, check before LLM call

priority_8_research_fallback.fix: If minimax fails/times out, fallback to nemotron-super for community analysis

priority_9_self_correct_fallback.fix: Change _self_correct to use _call_with_fallback chain instead of single model

priority_10_score_result.fix: Replace len(output)>=20 with critic.judge() call using verdict+confidence
